untranslatable_reason: This signal requires calculation of fair value using a cost-of-carry model, which is not a standard technical indicator in the allowed list. The rule depends on deriving fair_value through mathematical formula (spot price + cost of carry) and comparing it to market_price, neither of which can be expressed using the available indicators (price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, Volume, Position, Previous Bar, Returns, or Bar Properties). Additionally, the THRESHOLD_NEEDED parameter is not specified with a concrete value.
translation_notes: NATENBERG_DRY_144_0 describes a cash-and-carry arbitrage requiring real-time fair value computation. The signal is fundamentally a quantitative model-based strategy rather than a technical indicator-based signal. To implement this, a custom fair_value indicator would need to be added to the engine, or the strategy would need to be coded separately outside the indicator-based rule framework.
